anomalies.observed_anomaly: organization-status reports v3.3 goals while contract-register and roadmap-status still reference v3.0 release surfaces
anomalies.why_it_matters: operators cannot trust active runtime summaries to represent the current release baseline
anomalies.challenged_assumption: release-state coherence emerges automatically from code and docs changes
anomalies.follow_up_recommendation: introduce a canonical active release manifest and drift detection path
